output.answer:
The movie "The Breakfast Club" was released on **February 15, 1985**. This corresponds to the correct release date from the Wikidata results, as the 1985-02-15 date aligns with historical records of the film's theatrical debut. Other dates in the results likely represent re-releases or metadata errors.

<answer>
1985-02-15
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?movie rdfs:label "The Breakfast Club" @en ; wdt:P577 ?date .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 6 rows and 1 column:
| date                                |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1987-01-06T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2010-12-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1985-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1985-02-15T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1985-07-05T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1988-11-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
